title: Deep Impact Socket Set, 11PCS 1/2 Inch Driver 10mm-24mm Metric Deep Sockets with 1/4'' Hex Shank Socket Adapter, Automotive Trucks Car Tires Tractors Engines Repairing DIY Mechanic Tool
features: 6-POINT: The 6-point design of our drive sockets provides better grip and prevents rounding-off. It efficiently engages with flat sides of fasteners, ensuring a secure fit and minimizing the risk of slippage
DURABILITY: Made of high-quality chrome vanadium steel (CR-V) with high hardness, impact resistance , and not easy to crack ideal for demanding automotive and mechanical tasks
INCLUDED 10 x Metric drive deep sockets:10 mm, 12 mm, 13 mm, 14 mm, 16 mm, 17 mm, 19 mm, 21 mm, 22 mm, 24 mm; 1 x 1/4 hex shank socket adapter and 1 x specific storage box
EASY TO CHOOSE: The dimensions of each impact socket is etched on the socket itself and coded in three different colors, making them easy to identify when you take a socket out of the storage box

MULTIFUNCTION: This deep impact socket set is suitable for tools such as electric hand drills, impact drill, ratchet wrenches and so on. It can be used in scenarios such asautomobile, motorcycle, agricultural machinery, electrical maintenance, etc. It is also recommended for car tire replacement
description: Product Description Product Details: The 11 pcs 1/2 inch deep drive socket set is ideal for professional or DIY use. Forged from chrome vanadium steel, it is strong and durable. The surface is coated with black oxide for better adhesion and maximum corrosion resistance. High visibility laser-etched size mark for easier identification. For disassembly and tightening of long bolts and nuts, especially suitable for requiring large torque and narrow space. Comes with a high quality blow moulded carrying case. Compatible with pneumatic and electric impact, it can be used in various occasions such as automobile, motorcycle, agricultural machinery, electrical maintenance, furniture disassembly and assembly, DIY, etc. Specification: Square Drive: 1/2 inch Material: CR-V steel Length: 78mm Size: 10mm、12mm、13mm、14mm、16mm、17mm、19mm、21mm、22mm、24mm Package Included:10 x socket tool set、1 x 1/4 Hex Shank Socket Adapter、1 x case KIRXST 1/2" Drive 18mm Deep Impact Socket, 6 Point CR-V Deep Socket, 78mm Len...
